ideal_must_detect.matched_text: to be released no earlier than 16:30 HKT on 2026-09-30
no non-public analyst notes will be attached
do not circulate via personal emails
avoid collecting “data relating to a living individual whose identity is directly or indirectly ascertainable”
remove any sample signatures or ID pictures
no banking details, account numbers, or specimen IDs are to appear in this pack

must_detect.matched_text:
internal compliance note — hkex circular drafting status for Hexa Harbour Holdings Ltd. (fictional) regarding previously announced acquisition of Pine Shore Power (Holdings) Limited (fictional)
all references to the transaction are sourced from hkexnews postings dated 2024-01-12 and public SFC takeovers code materials; no reliance on unpublished analyses
no new price-sensitive details will be included; figures and timelines, where mentioned, will be drawn from the 2024 interim report already on the issuer’s website
please note team spa day scheduled friday 15:00; “spa” here means wellness afternoon and is unrelated to any share purchase agreement
pdpo: avoid collecting “data relating to a living individual whose identity is directly or indirectly ascertainable”; redact any cv details from board packs and omit personal contact fields
for sfo inside information purposes, drafts must avoid forward-looking financials, synergy ranges, or undisclosed assumptions; use neutral past-tense descriptions only
EMBARGO: investor-relations webpost and faq to be released no earlier than 16:30 HKT on 2026-09-30, to align with the hkexnews upload
negated mac: the draft maintains that no material adverse change has occurred since the last audited balance sheet date, mirroring wording already published in the circular
as disclosed, the definitive Share Purchase Agreement was executed on 2024-02-15; no annexes to the SPA will be reproduced in this memo
any percentages used should be public thresholds only (e.g., 30% general offer trigger under the takeovers code), not internal targets or hurdle rates
